---
name: dataset-limpio
description: Each correction to the engine invalidates the existing dataset. Regenerate COMPLETELY before retraining ML. Never mix old data with new.
type: feedback
---
# Clean Dataset

## Applies to: Any system with ML trained on data generated by the system itself

## Rule
If the engine changes -> the dataset generated with the old engine is GARBAGE.

## Protocol
```
Engine corrected (30 fixes)
  -> Old dataset (24,700 cases) = CONTAMINATED
  -> Regenerate COMPLETELY with the new engine
  -> Verify that new data is consistent (sample 100 cases)
  -> Retrain ML
  -> Verify metrics with NEW data (not old)
```

## Anti-pattern: the Frankenstein Dataset
```
BAD: "I'll add 10K new cases to the existing dataset"
     -> Mixes data with incorrect formula (old) and corrected formula (new)
     -> ML learns INCONSISTENT patterns
GOOD: Regenerate EVERYTHING from scratch with the corrected engine
```

## Signs of a contaminated dataset
- Reused fields (field_X = actually_field_Y)
- Check values from the wrong module
- Metrics improve without apparent reason
- Predictions contradict domain knowledge

**Why:** 24,700 cases generated with incorrect formulas were used to train ML.
**How to apply:** After EACH correction to the engine -> flag the dataset as invalid.
